name: Unarmed
description: Punches, kicks, grapples. Deals Superficial damage to vampires (halved before applying to track).

name: Knife / Dagger
description: Concealable blade. Superficial to vampires. A sharpened stake through the heart (Diff 3, Str + Weaponry) causes Torpor.

name: Stake
description: Wooden stake. Only effective through the heart (Diff 3). Causes Torpor — not Final Death. Incapacitates until removed.

name: Club / Baton / Baseball Bat
description: Blunt weapon. Deals Superficial damage to vampires. Easy to improvise.

name: Sword / Machete
description: Edged weapon. Superficial to vampires. Decapitation is possible (Messy Critical vs. immobilised, Diff 3 = Final Death).

name: Axe / Heavy Weapon
description: Slow but powerful. Superficial to vampires. Same decapitation rules as sword.

name: Pistol
description: Handgun. Superficial to vampires. Effective and concealable.

name: Shotgun
description: Superficial to vampires. −1 Difficulty at close range. Loud; draws attention.

name: Rifle
description: Long-range. Superficial to vampires. Requires setup; invisible from distance.

name: Fire
description: Torches, Molotov, flamethrower. Deals Aggravated damage to vampires and mortals. Triggers Terror Frenzy (Composure + Resolve, Diff 3).

name: Sunlight (Direct)
description: Direct sunlight. Aggravated damage each turn. Rate varies by BP and time of day (Storyteller discretion). Triggers Terror Frenzy.

name: Light Armor
description: Ballistic vest or armored jacket. Provides 1 die of armor against physical attacks. Wearable under clothing.

name: Heavy Armor
description: Tactical or military armor. Provides 2 dice of armor. Imposes −1 die to Dexterity-based rolls due to bulk.

name: Shield
description: Riot or military shield. Adds 1 die of armor in melee. Imposes −1 die on attacks.
